title: Build a House Painting
description: A CSS house illustration using position: relative on the container and position: absolute on all child elements. The chimney uses z-index: -1 to appear behind the house, the roof sits at top: 0, the door anchors to the bottom, and both windows are placed between the roof and door.
objectives: Use position: relative on a container to establish a positioning context
Use position: absolute on children to place them precisely within the container
Use z-index to layer the chimney behind the house
Use bottom: 0 to anchor the door to the bottom of the house
Use repeating-linear-gradient for decorative background patterns
